{{Infobox artifact
| name = Penance arrow
| introduced = Waybound
}}

''See also: [[Penance arrow Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance]] arrow is a specialized projectile used by [[Mercy]]. Unlike standard weaponry, these arrows possess an inherent ability to track their intended targets. They are extremely rare and limited in quantity, with only a few existing at any given time. The arrows carry a lethal [[essence]]; physical contact with one can cause a sensation of imminent death, described as a cold shiver or dark lightning that threatens the user's lifeline. When fired, they can be enhanced by forces of time and energy to increase their speed. While powerful enough to impact high-level entities like the [[Weeping Dragon]], they can also be used in conjunction with legendary equipment such as the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker]].}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance]] arrow once slammed into an [[Abidan panel]] of blue light, vanishing only to be replaced by a volley of bone arrows. This projectile later thundered through space and [[Fate]] toward [[Reigan Shen]]. During a later engagement, [[Lindon]] nocked one of these arrows, which was then accelerated by a circle of force and time. The weapon is known to cause a sensation of death upon contact, such as when its power numbed [[Ziel]]'s hand. Furthermore, the touch of a [[Penance]] arrow scrapes at the user's own lifeline.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance arrow]] slammed into the [[Abidan panel]] of blue light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance arrow]] vanished but was replaced by a volley of bone arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance arrow]] thundered through space and [[Fate]] at [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] nocked a [[Penance arrow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance arrow]] can cause a sensation of death upon touch.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The power of the [[Penance arrow]] numbed [[Ziel]]'s hand.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance arrow]] was accelerated by a circle of force and time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The touch of a [[Penance arrow]] scrapes at the user's lifeline.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
